packets.title: Lock desktop MVP scope and runtime contracts
acceptance_criteria: Published contract doc for agents/sessions/cron feeds
2-week packet order approved
Known risks with mitigations listed

packets.title: Implement runtime adapter normalization for agents/sessions/cron
acceptance_criteria: Adapters return stable typed shapes for all 3 feeds
Invalid payloads handled with safe fallback and diagnostics
Secret-like values are redacted in previews

packets.title: Wire Sessions page to live runtime feed
acceptance_criteria: Sessions list renders from runtime feed in normal mode
Empty/error/loading states are visible and actionable
No regressions in session selection and send actions

packets.title: Wire Agents and Cron dashboards to live runtime feeds
acceptance_criteria: Agents and Cron views use runtime feeds end-to-end
Fallback source badge correctly reports data source
UI remains responsive under stale/partial data

packets.title: Add reliability smoke checks for core data paths
acceptance_criteria: Smoke checklist covers Agents, Sessions, Cron flows
At least one automated sanity script runs clean
Defects triaged with severity and owner

packets.title: Harden runtime error telemetry and operator diagnostics
acceptance_criteria: Runtime adapter logs structured error reasons
User-facing error copy maps to operator action
No uncaught runtime exceptions in smoke pass

packets.title: MVP docs, release checklist, and handoff notes
acceptance_criteria: Operator runbook updated for live-data desktop MVP
Release notes include known issues and rollback steps
Handoff checklist validated by non-author

packets.title: Final MVP gate and go/no-go review
acceptance_criteria: All P0 packets marked done with evidence
Open defects reviewed with explicit disposition
Go/no-go decision logged
